btnChange.description: External link button class changed from btn-tertiary to btn-primary

tsx.categoryAccentColorsRetained: useSelect for per-pill accent colors correctly remains (still used for category pill styling)

php.docblockClean: Only @var string|null $anchor and @var bool $showExcerpt — useTopicColor gone

testPageUpdate.description: Test page reduced from 6 to 5 variations, topic color variation removed

priorFixesIntact.FQA001_wpDate: wp_date() still used throughout date comparison and ISO attribute logic — confirmed
priorFixesIntact.FQA002_timeElement: <time datetime="..."> still present in PHP (line 150) and <time dateTime={...}> in TSX (line 288) — confirmed

No visual regressions — gradient backgrounds, hero structure unchanged
Topic color variation correctly absent (was 6th instance, now removed)
btn-primary styling not directly visible in test page context (no external URL in test page post meta) but class confirmed in code

openIssues.description: TSX always renders the date-time <time> element (with 'Event Date' placeholder when no startDate). PHP guards with if($date_time_display). Minor editor-vs-frontend discrepancy, harmless in practice.
Lower group <div class='mt-12 flex flex-col gap-1'> always renders even when all children are absent. Not a real-world issue since TEC always populates _EventStartDate.
